com.google.protobuf.MessageLiteOrBuilder, com.google.protobuf.MessageOrBuilder

  • Method Details

    • hasSnapshot

      boolean hasSnapshot()
      Initial snapshot or periodic resync. Sent once on stream open and any
time the server detects the client's view may have diverged.
      .soulfire.v1.BotLiveState snapshot = 1;
      Returns:
      Whether the snapshot field is set.

    • getSnapshot

      BotLiveState getSnapshot()
      Initial snapshot or periodic resync. Sent once on stream open and any
time the server detects the client's view may have diverged.
      .soulfire.v1.BotLiveState snapshot = 1;
      Returns:
      The snapshot.

    • getSnapshotOrBuilder

      Initial snapshot or periodic resync. Sent once on stream open and any
time the server detects the client's view may have diverged.
      .soulfire.v1.BotLiveState snapshot = 1;
